differentials.name: High work load during exercise testing in patients with single-vessel disease (b)  decreased with:
differentials.raw: High work load during exercise testing in patients with single-vessel disease (b)  decreased with:

context: booster reinjection Imaging: =  map of regional perfusion obtained within minutes after injection at peak exercise; initial distribution proportional to myocardial blood flow + arterial concentration of radioisotope + muscle mass; 300,000-400,000 counts / view (~ 5-8 minutes sampling time), should be completed by 30 minutes Interpretation: √  "apical thinning" = less myocardial mass of cardiac apex as a normal finding √  normally diminished tracer uptake at basal portions of ventricle (near plane of mitral valve) ← more fibrous tissue + less muscle mass √  variation in tracer intensity by 15-2
